Tim Goss Is my attorney and has been very helpful is a strait shooter aways gets back to me. Best attorney I've had. Said they'd call back last week and didn't. Had to call today. Gave me no info on my case yet they're assigned. Guy just tried to rush me off the phone at which point I let him know their firm is fired before we even go to arraignment.  I won't be railroaded again by white people and the white justice system. Period. I'll die before I do and I'm not going back to any jail or plantation on charges that came from no where. Literally. I'll die before that period. HORRIBLE ATTORNEYS!!!!!
Dave Kirshenbaum is an excellent lawyer. He's helped me through some seemingly impossible situations and always has a great attitude. My only complaint is that I don't have two of him as counsel.

The kindest, most responsive and thorough team of lawyers I've come across. They made me feel comfortable and took time to go over all the details of the case, step by step what would happen and got me the best deal possible. I couldn't have been luckier than to be matched with Kirshenbaum & Goss.

Ms. Hunter is a well-connected (i.e. resourceful) attorney, old-schooled (think RBG, kind, balanced approach to law), thorough, transparent, and timely.   My one advice for prospective clients is while you should make your own choices, listen and weigh carefully to what she advises — as she will present the law you as it will possibly be.

I came to Kim with a very sensitive case involving my children. She was very knowledgeable about the law and kind to me considering the circumstances. She was prompt with any questions I had and very reasonable with her fees. She was able to negotiate an even better outcome that I would have thought possible. I would recommend her services to anyone in need of a lawyer.

Kim is an amazing attorney.  She knows the law and has a ton of resources at her fingertips.  communication was great, and the outcome was even better.  I was facing certain hardships with the courts.  Kim's patience, knowledge and reassurance got me through it with almost a slap on the hand.  She knows what she is doing.  Yes I do recommend her 100% And she saved me a lot of money from the goodness of her own heart.  Thank you Kim.

Kim was a great attorney.  From the first phone conversation I felt like we were in good hands. We never felt judged in any way and she was always available to answer our questions. My husband's case took a year and she was with us the whole time and in the end he was given a reduced  charge.we felt like she was fighting for us and was understanding.
Kim is a sweetheart and I enjoyed having her as my lawyer. She answered all my questions and explained all possible outcomes and what would be my best bet. Thanks Kim!
The worst communication skills I ever experienced. Try to find me off with somebody else without communicating with me first.
reviews.ownerResponse:
This individual was in a similar situation. I do not handle the type of case he was needing representation on. As he seemed anxious to find a lawyer immateriality. I contacted a colleague to reach out to him and discuss his case. Apparently, that was not what he wanted. I did not understand he wanted to talk with me first, at length even though the case was not in my area of law.
It was intended to get him some assistance quickly, as he seemed anxious, this is why I referred him to a colleague in the field of law he was needing.

reviews.text: I called Kim Hunters law office to review my wrongful conviction misdemeanor case. Without any explanation she denied helping me. Not a good experience with her.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is not correct.  For certain Attorney-client privilege reasons, I cannot comment on the particulars of why  I could not represent a case.  It involves conflict and ethical issues.  I did tell this individual I was not able to take his case, that explanation was not sufficient for him.  I gave him several names of other attorneys, even offering to call them for him, but he was not happy with any attempt I made to assist him,  within the constraints I was up against.

reviews.text:
Kim was patient, understanding and quite realistic in helping me understand how the courts could impact my life. She helped me set up payments for the legal matters and directed me in finding how she could help and honestly how she could not help - with matters outside her purview.

Kim’s maturity, honesty and skill in legal realms in the courts helped guide my life from the unnecessary peril of hopped-up police allegations to defending myself through her guidance with truth and evidence for a God-given outcome.  Kim changed my life and my life’s outcome with skill and direction.  I hope to Heaven she can do the same for you all.

Religious or not, Kim is super good at what she does.  Trust her with your future because I’m so happy I did.

If you cannot afford an attorney, at least try calling Kim to see what financial arrangements might occur.  A chance of hearing no or yes is far better than no chance for an attorney whatsoever.  To this day, I am so grateful to have called and forged a relationship with Kim.  No other attorney could have done for me what Kim did in court and in supporting my future through her actions.

I would highly recommend Kim as your attorney. Kim hunter was mine and did an outstanding job. She always had the time to answer all my questions and to make me feel completely comfortable and confidant along our way!! She was very caring and reassuring.

Thank you so much Kim!!

Devanni

Kim Hunter's advice proved invaluable for my son on two different occasions.  Her counsel helped him immensely in seeing two legal actions through the court system.  Kim has knowledge, experience, honesty, integrity, and compassion on her side.  I recommend her highly!

Kim is the best option by far for anyone in the area if they need a dependable and dedicated attorney. Kim has been their for me for almost three years now and has always surpassed my expectations by far. She's always available to talk whenever you have questions. She goes above and beyond to make sure your taken care of and will be easily the best choice around.

I was wrongly accused of  2nd degree criminal trespass by a government law enforcement agency.  After interviewing several criminal lawyers I chose Kim Hunter to represent me.  I made the right choice!  Don't let her friendly, easy to talk to demeanor fool you.  She is confident and forceful in the courtroom and seems to always achieves her goals in that venue. Under her counsel we breezed through the complicated court process.  Her presence greatly reduced my stress.  Clearing my name took 18 months.  During that time she never waivered, she always believed in me and defended me. She did not quit until my case was dismissed and my good name was restored.  It is without hesitation that I recommend Kim should you need a good defense attorney.  Her extensive knowledge and experience in the legal system and court room will put you at ease.  There is a quality of Excellence in her work that shines through and assures you she is the only criminal defense attorney you will ever need.  Thanks Kim!
Michael was recommended by a friend of mine. He is honest, hard working and will respond to your calls and emails very quickly. I highly recommend Boswell Law Offices, PLLC.
Mike does a fantastic job. He is always very honest, gives great advice, and very reasonably priced. So glad he was recommended to me! I plan on recommending him in the future!

Mike Boswell helped our company with transitioning from a status of Sole Proprietor, to our current position as an S Corporation.
We are very happy with the results and He continues to advise us.

Michael Boswell has provided legal services for By Design Engineering (BDE) through the past ~ five years.  These services provided by Michael are of the highest standard.  He incorporated our business, developed and executed the engineering firms submission to the state.  He also develops BDE's annual reports, and follows up with legal forms for the state of Washington.  He has advised our company regarding contracts, legal questions, and made recommendations for other services that BDE required.  He maintains a "flag system" and notifies BDE when reports to the state are necessary.

On a personal note, Boswell Law developed our personal will which includes distribution of all assets as prescribed, including the BDE business.

I recommend Boswell Law services for both commercial and personal needs.

Finding a good lawyer is very hard and I have used Boswell Law for almost 10 years now. I give Boswell Law the highest recommendation possible. Always there when you need them and really gives you a good understanding of your options with the best outcome. Great local lawyer that has my back! Thank you

Boswell Law Offices helped me with a legal matter for my business.  Michael's advice & ideas brought up several issues I hadn't considered & the documents he created were professional & timely as well.  And, his post-transaction support was helpful as well.
Great , knowledgeable attorney
Our family attorney.

Very Professional! I am using these legal services for probate purposes and Kristin Dresser(the lawyer)has explained the process so  that I could understand and ask the proper questions. The office is very comfortable and soothing, which helped me feel comfortable explaining a sensitive topic.I recommend if you need a lawyer to contact A Street Legal Services.
Great service able to deliver and got me out traffic violations multiple times

I admittedly only interacted with a woman at the front door.  She seemed to be far more interested in talking to her friends than sparing 2 minutes to talk to me.  I admit that I was searching for a job and not bringing in business but I have been in many law firms looking for work and no one has treated me that poorly

Suzanne is an amazing, talented, and caring elder law, estate planning, guardianship, and probate attorney. She is a rare combination of incredibly intelligent, fantastic attorney, and genuinely kind human being.

Gibson may have been a great lawyer at one time but he would and should just retire. Instead of trying to understand my case and support me his client from way out of town and I asked if I should come in for a pre trail meeting told me no it was fine. Day of trail arrives and he starts questioning me about what the other side was saying. If he was competent he would have used the three months leading to the trail to ask any questions he had not at the court house. Completely unprofessional and a waste of any money. This case was regarding family law. May be better in other types of law idk.
Top notch attorney, Great service Will use again if the need arises.
efficient, accurate, and responsive. this guy will keep you covered!

not a nice lawyer . called about a few questions and he just kept yelling over at his front desk very unprofessional .

Inquired after a consultation, and was met with hostility at the very idea that I record it so I can recall what was discussed. I understand this industry is outside of my realm of expertise and that may not be the norm, but the unprofessionalism I received just for asking boggled my mind.

Carlos and McKenna are amazing. They helped me settle my high profile divorce case.  They are extremely intelligent, informative, and they actually spend the time they to need on your case. They were the third attorneys office I used, and they were by far the most competent. The first two never even set up a face to face meeting. I love how straight forward and to the point Carlos is. McKennas ability to find my exes hidden information was superb. I recommend them to anyone going through a difficult divorce.

My husband and I cannot begin to thank Carlos and his outstanding staff enough. I had the unfortunate experience of being served w a harassment suit in early August 2023. Despite being extremely busy in superior court at the time Carlos took my case and resolved it in my favor within an extremely short window of time. The plaintiff in my case delayed delivering her documents to late morning of the 1:30 hearing.  Carlos’s support staff was able to secure documents and Rocio displayed documents over Zoom for all 3 defendants despite having received them just minutes prior to the hearing. Carlos’s excellent defense was lauded by all 3 parties present. His ability to synthesize and analyze information in the moment was beyond amazing. He and his staff turned what could have been a disaster into a learning opportunity and actually fun day.
Plus they have the best
snacks !
Needless to say we would not hesitate to recommend Sosa Law Firm or use the again if needed.
Family practice. Very helpful with my sons case! Would recommend him to everyone!
Went online to inquire about my situation, and someone got back to me immediately!! He listened to me and took the time to give me helpful advice. Forgot his name🫤

Carlos comes off like he is King Kong. It's an act! He likes to berate you, take your money, give you timelines, and then not follow them. God forbid you ask why he isn't doing what he said, he will yell at you, and if you persist in asking he just withdraws from the case.  His arguments are weaker than circus lemonade in my opinion. He's washed up and just takes money while not caring about you one bit.   Wasted 2 month of my life with this person.  I've had to hire lots of attorneys over the last 25 years for many different things. This one is simple: The juice isn't worth the squeeze.
Hard to find

I did not speak with an attorney, but the woman who I spoke with on the phone was very kind, caring and really helped me figure out my question. I had spoken with 7 other people at other places before her with no assistance from them. She was fantastic.
The  service was amazing,  more than I could  as for and I won my case using this firm lawyer

Mr. Sosa is a great attorney.

Excellent attorney, very personable , very direct and to the point , does not promise anything but expect the best results . he reads the work and does the work  highly recommend him and will use him again if needed

I find it very fishy that this needlessly aggressive and clearly unprofessional attorney has a 2.5 rating on Avvo yet his rating jumps here on Google where anyone can review. LOL. Friends and family writing reviews is certainly helpful.
It should also be noted his license to practice law has in the past been suspended, for a staggering 165 days.
If you're looking for legitimate and effective representation, this is not the guy to go to.

I was referred to Carlos from a friend who practices a different area of law. He was highly recommended for his expertise, effectiveness and ability to achieve results in family law.  Upon initial contact, I was impressed by the responsiveness of his office staff.  Unlike a previous attorney I hired, I found Mr. Sosa to be compassionate yet realistic in regards to expectations.

I accompanied my adult son on his first visit with Mr. Sosa which pertained to a possible divorce.  This man was wonderful!  He was very factual, did not make promises of what he could get for him, and did not make any suggestion that he proceed.  We both walked away from Mr. Sosa's office, knowing the choices, and  feeling better than we have for weeks!  He'll certainly be my choice for legal work in the future!

Our family has retained Carlos twice over the past 8 years to handle estate matters of relatives. He offers down to earth realistic advice that clearly outlines possible choices, paths, and outcomes. His service and attention to detail is highly professional and timely. We've never been left in the lurch waiting to hear from him or in doubt that he has done what promised.

To be perfectly upfront, this man represented my daughter's now ex- husband. If you don't want to do any if your own research and you don't want to try to amicably resolve your divorce or family issue with the least amount of cost and headache, but you do want to unnecessarily spend way too much money on your divorce, this is the guy to choose.

Advise: DON’T HIRE JOHN STOCKS and this firm.

Money hungry and does not file things properly. STEER AWAY! Simple as that.

Mr. Stocks is a professional through and through.  We are fortunate to be both business acquaintances, and business neighbors. We have seen him act with integrity and honesty , putting his clients and staff first, always.  We highly recommend him!
An honestly professional law firm.

John Stocks has provide legal advice to me on many occasions. He is a true professional who is always looking to do what is right for his client. John is very responsive and has very friendly staff.

He represented me for misdemeanor for four months Never filed a motion on my behalf. He did not present the Court the photo he showed me that exhonerated the charge. İ disputed his $32K fee so he sued me himself in Superior Court charging his bloated fees for sueing me, which is against Rules of Professional Conduct. The King County Superior Court Judge denied me Discovery and awarded him $70K in fees at Summary Judgement, included his boated time for suing me. Never gave me credit for the $12K İ had already paid. He got the first $70K from sale of my house. That is the kind of attorney you should avoid at all costs.

Terry Law Firm was the best choice  we could have made. Met Kelly Haynes first, She is Scott Terrys secretary. She is wonderful. Knows her job for sure, very helpful. reviews.text: I retained Mr. Terry and he did not do a good job. He would call me up the day before saying hey are you gonna be at the courthouse tomorrow? I said what you never told me I had to be. His response was oh my bad I would definitely not ever use him again or Recommend anyone else retain him. He will gladly take your money and not represent you well. To support the statement take a look at his retainer that he provides you.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Wow, it has been over three years since I handled your case. I am sorry you were disappointed with my representation on your case. We clearly have different definitions of “Good Job”! To me, Good Job = Good Results.
When a client walks in facing a felony charge and a gross misdemeanor charge, I consider it an excellent job where: 1) I successfully negotiate the charges (with a very experienced Prosecutor) down to a misdemeanor with a deferred sentence (meaning the client is in full control over having charge being dismissed and ending up with a clean record) and 2) I successfully convinced the judge to accept the recommendation over the strenuous objections of the complaining witnesses (who wanted the prosecutor fired because of the deal that I negotiated). In doing so I put the ultimate results in the clients control and saved the client the risk and expense of rolling the dice in trial. I consider that to be an excellent result and thus a VERY GOOD JOB. I don’t think there is an experienced attorney or judge who would disagree. As to the phone call reminders - I have made it a practice to call my clients and remind them of a hearing the day before a hearing so that they would not forget to show up. This is in addition to the written notice they receive from the court and reminder letters from my office.
I wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

reviews.text: These guys are really awesome when it comes to taking care of you. He understood where we were coming from, took good notes.  One phone visit to get details, and they took care of everything.  One month after the first visit, we walked out with everything we need.

reviews.text: I was referred to this man by a friend. I contacted Mr. Terry and discussed my case with him. It’s a premise Liability case with Costco. I am permanently deformed and I hunted for the rest of my life. He asked me to call him back when I had more information from my surgeon. I did so but he never returned his call. I sent him emails with the updated information and nothing. Totally unprofessional! Even his secretary couldn’t get me a returned phone call or email. Finally, I sent an email telling him that I was going to file a complaint and what do you know, I heard from him. He was a real jerk. Blamed his secretary (big man) and called my case weak. I suggest staying far away.

Mr. Terry did what my first  attorney wasn’t able to do for me. In 3 1/2 months my first attorney blew through $13,000 and I walked away with nothing from him.
Mr. Terry was on my case for one month and after being away from home for almost 5 months, he got me home and he helped me to keep my good name good! If you need a good criminal attorney, Mr. Terry is the one for you!
He responds to emails, calls and texts when other attorneys do not. I highly recommend him to everyone who has been charged unjustly! He is conveniently located in Sumner and always comes through!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Julia, you were wonderful to work with as well.

reviews.text: My very first accident happened. Thank God I had the Terry Law Firm close to home. They are the best! I've had a few hiccups and they have had my back threw it all and helped me get threw them! I'd recommend them to anyone!

Dear Terry Scott,,and Gatdet Deng who was visiting your office last week and just saying hi, and i haven't been check you back since the visitation. it look like DOL has some cleared the status of suspension pending of my license online according to the website when i look check the status.

I appreciate professionals who are willing to stand in the gap for those who do not know how to fight for themselves. That is what was done for me, and I now have freedoms back that should never have been taken from me. Thanks are not enough. I am forever gratedul to you and your team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Justin, you are a pleasure to work with.

reviews.text:
We wont go to anyone else.
Scott has been by our side for a few years now
And always has seen our request through to the end.
Very trustworthy, honest very easy  to work with.
If I could  give him ten stars I would.
Thank you Terry law firm  for your excellent
Professionalism and will definitely be my first to call.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Shiree, you know I am always there for you!

reviews.text: If you need or want an experienced and knowledgeable Attorney, Scott Terry is who you should contact. When I walked into his office I had never met him or his staff before. He was highly recommended by a friend, I was upset, frightened, desperate and felt hopeless. When I walked out of that office, I was calm and confident believing that he would take care of my situation, of which he did in a timely manor! He went above and beyond of what I had expected. Scott is kind, patient and non-judgemental. His paralegal is very competent and her personality will make your day.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Barbara, it was a pleasure to represent you.

reviews.text: Awesome people
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Vivian!
Thank you, Mike!
Thank you Jarnail!
Thank you, Christian!

reviews.text: We are very grateful to the Terry Law Firm for their kind and caring service as we had our Will and accompanying documents prepared.  Mr. Terry was wonderful at explaining aspects of a Will which we had not previously thought about.  We feel very secure in the documents which have been prepared for us and comforted in knowing things will be taken care of in a manner we wish.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Aaron!

reviews.text: Kevin is very nice and easy to work with. He helped me with going trough  probate process smoothly  and stress free. He DID NOT charge me additionaly for all of my questions  and  explained  everything  whenever  I need it. I would highly recommend  him to everyone who needs help with probate.
Attorney Kevin Copp is smart, thoughtful, and efficient. We really appreciated his help. 10/10 recommend.

Five stars to Kevin for his professionalism and efficiency. He helped us put together a thorough and detailed estate trust and made sure to walk us through general law and policies for such legal matters. He is very welcoming and well organized. Great to have him represent us.
I made a apt. for a consultation & Mr.Kevin Copp was the attorney whom gave me the opportunity too ask questions,about law's I had no idea. It's nice having attorney's whom give consultations.
Kevin Copp is so helpful, kind, and understanding

Best attorney ever!! Kevin Copp was my savior a couple years ago —  what he did then, still has an amazing impact on my life, and I’m eternally grateful.    I was in panic mode —extreme family conflicts and threats going against my parents wishes after their passing.  (He was not my parents Atty). His extensive knowledge, compassion, and respect for all people is rarely found in life, let-alone the countless Atty’s I’ve dealt with.  HE DID SO MUCH ABOVE AND BEYOND— BLOWING AWAY MY HIGHEST HOPES & QUICKLY MAKING THEM THE REALITY.  KEVIN TRULY CARES ABOUT PEOPLE—HIS COMPASSION AND REASSURANCE GOT ME THROUGH my worst times. Thank you!! His office staff is also amazing!!
Excellent Trust fund attorney. Concise, informative, efficient. Very accommodating.
I think this place is great. I recently did a bunch of work with the company and I am highly satisfied with the results. If anybody cares, I really recommend these guys.
Contact them once tried calling again and no answer.
Michael is a nice and good attorney

If you’re looking for a highly effective, fair and professional mediator, choose Tim Edwards!

Tim moderated two different mediation sessions during my recent divorce action.  His expertise in family law is undisputed.  He was tough but fair (in my view both are critical for a mediator).  I needed to hear the tough truth of how the law would likely be applied.  And I needed someone with a backbone who could nudge both sides toward a reasonable agreement.

Although we did not come to an agreement in our first session, we appreciated and respected Tim’s approach so much that we chose him for the second session as well.  In the second session, Tim led us to a fair and equitable agreement.  You cannot go wrong with Tim leading your mediation.

THANK YOU for your expert touch, Tim!

I cannot say enough positive things about Sara and the team at Tim Edwards & Associates. After attempting multiple times to establish a parenting plan independently without success - I turned to acquiring counsel in hopes of finding resolve. Sara took on my case and from beginning to end was communicative, confident, organized and reasonable in her suggested solutions. During arbitration she maintained herself professionally and came very well prepared, which I strongly believe was tied to the fair but favoring results received. Family law can be stressful and difficult to navigate but when you have the proper team behind you - it simply does not have to be. I would highly recommend this team to friends, family and strangers alike.

Tim is an amazing mediator and I would highly recommend him. He took time to explain how and what his role is as a mediator and was great at answering any questions. Tim has substantial experience in the past as a lawyer and a judge. My divorce case had been taking a long time and I was relieved to finally get resolution using mediation and having Tim as our mediator.
Friendly, and easy to work with in a stressful  situation.
Great mediator

Mr. Edwards was very professional and effective.  The outcome was resolved in a fashion that was reasonable.

I highly recommend him for mediation purposes.

Tim Edwards & Associates was a life saver for me. I had a pretty complicated situation and they were very patient, helpful, and strategic with my case. I have recommended Sara to others and will always recommend Sara and Tim Edwards & Associates.
Fantastic team of lawyers. They listened carefully to everything I wanted and brought their experience and expertise to get a favorable outcome!

Sara was incredible to work with. She was incredibly informative, always taking the time to explain each step of the process clearly. Communication was timely, and I never felt left in the dark. Most importantly, they were extremely well-prepared, which gave me confidence and peace of mind throughout my case. I highly recommend this office to anyone seeking knowledgeable and dependable legal support in family matters.

Divorce isn't easy - it is draining and has you questioning everything. Thankfully, the team at Tim Edwards & Associates was thoughtful, informative, affordable, and supportive to help me navigate the process and keep everything moving along. I appreciated the clear communication, time management, and thoroughness with which they answered my (many) questions. As someone who was navigating the process from across the country, I felt confident with them in my corner.

Today, I made a call to try to set up an appointment for a consultation. The secretary that answered the call asked for some general information. She had trouble hearing me so I turned off my beats headphones and repeated myself. She said I was yelling and hung up on me. Thanks for the help.
reviews.ownerResponse: The level of respect we expect from any potential client includes respect toward our staff.  We do not tolerate individuals yelling at our employees and did not schedule a consultation with this individual based on the disrespect directed toward our staff.

reviews.text: Worked hard to make my divorce go smoothly. Do recommend their services but hopefully never need them again.

Mediation is not the most pleasurable experience, but I believe Tim Edwards made it as easy and seamless as it could have been. I found Tim to be thorough, thought-provoking, and agreeable. One can really tell that Tim has many years under his belt with this kind of work.  I'm grateful that I got the opportunity to work with him during this stressful time.

Just called to see if I can get a consultation about what I have going on. I didn’t even get to talk about what I had to say. They told me they can’t do a consultation with me. I told them that my divorce has already been finalized, but I need to redo some things. So they told me all the sudden that they don’t have any consultations at this timeI can see that it’s a money, hungry problem with these people. Highly don’t recommend
reviews.ownerResponse: This individual was never in any capacity a client of our firm.  The baseless and inaccurate statements made by this individual are very inappropriate and should not be considered reliable.  No individual who would recklessly create a negative review when they had no official relationship with our firm should ever be viewed as a source of legitimate information.

reviews.text: I had the opportunity to work with Tim Edwards as the mediator in my divorce case, and I truly appreciate him and his thorough guidance. Tim was kind, compassionate, and incredibly knowledgeable about all aspects of this process. While i dont know what happened on the other side, he created a calm and respectful environment that made it possible for us to reach a resolution in the midst of a very difficult and traumatic time. I’m deeply grateful for his help and would highly recommend him to anyone in need of a skilled and patient mediator

Tim Edwards & Associates, P.S.

I had the pleasure of working with Tim as my mediator, and I am incredibly grateful for his support throughout the process. Tim was very professional, highly experienced, and extremely knowledgeable. His calm demeanor and thoughtful approach made me feel confident and supported every step of the way. I’m glad he was the one guiding us—he truly made a difficult situation more manageable.

Thank you, Tim, for your exceptional work.
Tim is an amazing mediator and I'm still not sure how he managed to get the other party to come to an agreement. I am just so grateful he was able to!
Tim was very straight forward and clear about all details and the pathway to a resolution.  Very much appreciated his style of mediation.
Tim took very good care of me, my wants and needs were respected by his thorough mediation skills. I thank Tim for his patience and experience to get through my divorce process.

Tim was amazing. My divorce was contentious and I was really worried about being able to come to a resolution. Tim worked diligently to get us to an agreement that was pretty fair for both parties. I would definitely recommend his services!
He is very experienced. The process was very smooth.
Tim was very fair, extremely informative, and awesome mediator for our case. Highly recommend.
I couldn't have found a better mediator . Easy to work with. Wonderful experience. A+++

Tim Edwards and his team was great to work with.  They handled my case expediently.  I had a tight timeline to finalize everything.  Alexis was on top of items, quick to answer any questions I had.  Would recommend working with them without reservations.

I highly recommend this firm. Tim and his team handled my case quickly and efficiently. I appreciated their excellent communication throughout the process and found the whole team to be highly competent and ethical. Alexis specifically was amazing!

My experience with the paralegal, Alexis was excellent.  I did not feel Sara, the lawyer was as prepared as she could have been for the first court date, but I was genreally satisfied with her services. However the clincher for me was receiving a late notice on services that were rendered only the week prior.  My case was finishing up and I was waiting another week (until the end of the month when invoices had been sent) to pay my final bill.  Robin Edwards again sent the invoice as a late notice and then had the audacity to acuse me of arguing.  Unfortunately what had been a good experience turned sour.

I was very pleased with Tim Edwards Law and Associates. I was represented by Sara Leach and she has done an outstating job fighting for my case. It was a complicated case and lengthy, but she was able to get me a fair settlement. Throughout the length of the case, Sara and her paralegal were always updating me of any new information, also it was always easy to contact them if I had any questions and they would respond right away with an answer.

Don’t use them if you want to win. All they care about is your money. They don’t like it when you ask questions they don’t care about meeting you. I never met my attorney until the day of trial. They don’t argue in your case but want more and more of your money. Please go elsewhere so you can have a chance plenty of great attorneys out there.

We partnered with Tim Edwards from 2018-2019. We had nothing but great feedback, updates, expectations were set, understood and other items explained as needed. I would recommend this law firm to everyone! 10/10

Tim Edwards and Associates served as my Family Law team over several years.  Their team is excellent and supportive.  Sara Leach was my lawyer for several years, through several difficult motions, a divorce, creation of a parenting plan, development of a pension division order, and many appeals.  Her guidance and expertise was top-notch, and she truly wanted to help us find the best resolution possible.  Highly, highly recommend her for all family law matters.
Great advice . Professional   and competent.

Our family was recently represented by Tim Edwards Law.  From the beginning, their service was excellent.  They returned calls quickly, listed to our concerns with understanding, and kept us on track to resolve the situation.  At times, our emotions were overwhelming, but they were always there with sound advice and comfort.  In the end, we achieved our goal, thanks to them.
Robin was a gem.  She was our go-to troubleshooter, sometimes telling us what we needed to hear, and not always what we wanted to hear.
In the end, the results we perfect.  We can't thank them enough.

Tim and his associates are professional and have a great knowledge of the law. They all take time and listen to you. They treat you like you are a person, not just another case. My case was pretty unique but still in the realm of family law. Sara took my case, I was represented as if my case was just as important to her as it was me. I felt heard and finally felt as though I found a team that would and could help me finally win my case. They do not back down, they know the law inside and out and know how to represent you fully in the law. I am so thankful I found them. My family and I finally have peace. I cannot express what a blessing that is and what this entire office has been to us. I hope to never need a family law attorney again, but if I do, I wouldn't call anyone else.
Very worthy of chatting, visiting  and the whole nine yards. Very professional and patient. Courteous  and amazing She is. One would never regret walking her way.

I just wanted to take a moment to thank Mr. Edwards for his guidance during our meditation.  He helped us navigate a seemingly impossible situation with excellent communication, knowledge and professionalism.  I am pleased with the outcome of this settlement as it was a true give and take agreement.  I couldn't imagine a scenario where both parties would come away feeling great about the situation, but coming away feeling heard and with a sense of being able to live with the outcome and not feel devastated is a win in my book.

Again, thank Mr. Edwards you for helping us navigate this, you are a true professional and I will certainly recommend you should any of my friends and family be in the unfortunate position of needing your services.  Wishing you, your family and your firm all the best.
Very professional! Always kept me informed throughout the process and made me aware of my opportunities or where I was standing in my case. They have a great team working for you!

As a mediator, Tim Edwards is not someone who seems to care about quality time with family. In our mediation he had a boiler plate parenting plan and he refused to change it to meet our needs. It's based on alternating weekends, no matter what else happens. He did not seem to care about our needs. This means that your two week summer vacation is interrupted by a weekend, which means we really can't get away. Three day weekends and holidays also revolve around these weekends.  So, if you believe in alternating weekends trumping all else, go with this guy. If you want quality time to go and do things with your kids then consider getting someone else who understands family time.

Tim Edwards & Associates were a blessing in my family's life. Tim was very professional and assured my husband that he did have a standing chance of getting 50/50 custody of his son and helped us start the custody case. Then Sara took over our case and amazed us with her counsel and professionalism in court. The paralegal team was also so very helpful, always answering questions and addressing concerns in a timely manner. My husband now has 50/50 legal and physical custody of my step-son. Worth every single penny.
I would hire Tim & Sara before your future ex does! Team of winners!
Very knowledgeable. Highly recommend! Thanks Tim!
Great people who work hard to fight for what is a fair settlement.
Takes MO ey no free advice

I had the displeasure of being on the other side of Tim.  He's well known for being aggressive which sounds good until he's so aggressive that he causes all kinds of unnecessary issues.  Tim's letters to my attorney were full of personal attacks and character assassination.  He's was just flat out rude at times.  I finally hired a different attorney and it was amazing how the tone of his letters changed.  He knew he could belittle with the first attorney and so he did (although it didn't accomplish anything, just made everyone mad).  WIth my second attorney, Tim knew he couldn't get away with that unprofessional behavior so he stopped.

We also had a mediation because of a simple issue with health insurance.  My attorney, the mediator and Tim agreed with my position so I asked the mediator why Tim didn't just tell his client that and she said "I think he just needed support"  Sadly I spent thousands on an unnecessary mediation because Tim was afraid to stand up to his client.

There are so many good attorneys in the area.  I'd look elsewhere.

Mr. Edwards is amazing. He arbitrated my duvorce. He is magic. Im telling you i was totally amazed and in shock how much he got me. He stood up, demanded fairness and we suceeded. I will always be greatful for his service. Wirth every penny 10 fold. Search no further. He is your man.
Tanya Hall
Great attorney and afford able. Got the job done.i was very happy with his work. Would recommend him to anyone.

Cannot recommend Dale enough. I have worked with him on a couple different cases, he is quick to respond and very attentive. He also does a great job at explaining things in ways that I can understand. Would send any friend his way!
Dale made the process of doing a will easy and informative.

Dale helped me with two legal matters. I had not met him until recently.
I was delighted with the job Dale did on both of my cases. He is very knowledgeable and professional. His fees were reasonable and he is very strong advocate. I have had the opportunity to work with many attorneys over the years and I put Dale at the TOP of the list. I recommend him without qualification.  Thank you Dale !!!!!
Have used Dale on several occasions.  Always find him to be well informed, highly professional, and extremely easy to work with.  Highly recommended
Dale Holland is professional timely expert fair and honest in every aspect of his business

I have known Dale for many years. He is an admirable and knowledgeable attorney. Very professional and accomplished, he will fulfill ones task.

The first time I met him, I was a single mom with 2 little boys going through a unforeseen divorce that had truly shocked me and I had no idea what to do. That was 27 years ago! He knew exactly what to do. My boys were 4 years & 9 months old. As they grew up, things I never thought of would arise. Things he had already handled in the divorce papers many years before. Clear through their college years!

I’ve referred many friends to him and every one of them very happy with him….even the ones he couldn’t legally help - he has excellent advice to point you in the right direction.

I recently had the chance to work with Dale Holland and would highly recommend him.  I respect his level of knowledge, professionalism, and experience.  He clearly explained complex matters that helped me better understand the process of my case.  He is easy to talk to and is genuine and easy to work with.  I will definitely use his services again if needed in the future.

Caring, personal and compassionate. Willing to listen to concerns and provide options for solutions. Very thorough and helpful in taking care of details in legal documents & agreements. Highly Knowledgeable re: family law!  I highly recommend working with Dale.

Dale helped resolve a personal injury claim which went beyond something I could navigate on my own. He has the knowledge and expertise that led to a great resolution. He and his staff were always quick to respond to any questions and relay communications as they came up and made sure I could understand all of the options.  So thankful for how he handled everything. Highly recommended!

I am so thankful I had Mr Holland prepare my will documents. Dale is professional ,and very thorough. I don’t understand legal jargon and he explained it to me so I could understand . Awesome experience and grateful to have this step in life finalized  . Highly recommended 🙏
All correspondence was quick, efficient and professional. Dale was wonderful to work with. Telecommunications made everything easier to incorporate around my work schedule.

I was married for 21 years. Our divorce degree stated I would receive half of my ex's pension when he retired. As I got closer to retirement myself, I went to 2 attorneys to ask them for help in getting the process going since my ex had already retired. Both of those attorneys dropped the ball. I had waited and counted on them. I was heartsick but I would not give up. I hired Mr. Dale Holland to help get the process going. It was not as simple as one would think because the divorce was so long ago. The wording in the divorce decree had to change due the request of the Washington Retirement system to comply with their process. Mr. Holland represented me wholly and completely by getting the job DONE. You have no idea what this meant to me. Mr. Holland is a very honorable man. I am a very satisfied client and would recommend Dale Holland anytime to someone needing an attorney that will work for you so that justice is served. Dale Holland gets the job done!

My wife and I have worked with Dale twice - once for a will, and a second time for a court proceeding involving a family member.  In both cases we found Dale to be personal, professional, sensitive, and wise.  He handled matters with insight both technical and personal, and with the kind of skill that comes from experience.  He is bright, ethical, and warm.  We recommend him highly.  :-)

Dale J. Holland has been my lawyer for years and always delivers great service and a favorable outcome with all speeding tickets. Mr. Holland is efficient, listens to my concerns, and works hard to get the best possible outcome with the facts and circumstances presented. I make sure to recommend Mr. Holland to all of my friends and family who are in need of legal services and I trust him with all of my personal matters.

Got the job done but he is very rude. I know he needs to work for his clients best interest, but I was there helping my mother with her estate needs after my father passed away. He made me feel as if I were there to influence her and undermine her.  That was last year. Today my sister called to add herself as a power of attorney as mom is now living with her. Again he was rude and she had to defend herself. I am glad he is acting protective of our mother but no need to assume we are trying to take advantage of her.  Will never go back.

I consider Dale to be my trusted advisor for legal needs. I have known and done business with Dale for many years. He is always approachable, a good listener, fair, honest and gives excellent counsel. I would highly recommend Dale.
Dale Holland assisted my law firm with a messy unlawful detainer for an estate. We paid a flat fee. Dale got the job done as promised, quickly and efficiently.

Went to him with a very easy case that could easily get dismissed he wanted $3,000 he might have had to go to court  one maybe two times I think that was a little much for such a little case would of hated to see what he would of charge me for a dui
